title: Construct hose and pipe assemblies for competition vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct hose and pipe assemblies for competition vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from competition information1.2 Materials and consumables are selected and checked according to application and procedures to minimise waste material1.3 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Work area is cleaned and prepared according to job requirements

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Construct hose and pipe assemblies

pcs.text: Hose and pipe length is measured and material requirements are calculated2.2 Hose and pipe are cut to length according to according to team procedures and safety requirements2.3 Hose and pipe are bent to conform to fitting requirements according to team procedures and safety requirements2.4 Hose and pipe fittings are connected according to component supplier specifications and procedures and team requirements2.5 Hose and pipe assembly is cleaned and pressure-tested according to component supplier specifications, team procedures and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Hose and pipe length is measured and material requirements are calculated2.2 Hose and pipe are cut to length according to according to team procedures and safety requirements2.3 Hose and pipe are bent to conform to fitting requirements according to team procedures and safety requirements2.4 Hose and pipe fittings are connected according to component supplier specifications and procedures and team requirements2.5 Hose and pipe assembly is cleaned and pressure-tested according to component supplier specifications, team procedures and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Hose and pipe length is measured and material requirements are calculated2.2 Hose and pipe are cut to length according to according to team procedures and safety requirements2.3 Hose and pipe are bent to conform to fitting requirements according to team procedures and safety requirements2.4 Hose and pipe fittings are connected according to component supplier specifications and procedures and team requirements2.5 Hose and pipe assembly is cleaned and pressure-tested according to component supplier specifications, team procedures and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Construct hose and pipe assemblies

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable material is disposed of and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Surplus components and consumables are tagged and stored3.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to team procedures
